title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sahyadri Hospitals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sahyadri Hospitals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sahyadri Hospitals, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sahyadri Hospitals:
Sahyadri Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals!
